combined_text:
[Page 1]
Srinivasa Sowmiyan
♂phone7200676611/envel⌢pesowmiyan00@gmail.com/linkedinlinkedin.com/in/srinivasa-sowmiyan/
Summary
Backend Developer with 4 years of experience building and maintaining enterprise application using Java and Spring Boot. Experienced in
REST API development, SQL optimization, distributed systems, and containerized deployments. Skilled in troubleshooting production
issues, improving application performance, and developing scalable backend services in high-availability environments.
Experience
CloudBees Mar 2024 – Apr 2026
Associate Software Engineer Remote
• Designed and developed scalable backend components using Java and Spring Boot for an enterprise DevOps continuous delivery
(CDRO) platform.
• Built a Kubernetes-based auto-scaling agents feature in Java supporting 10K+ daily pipeline runs, reducing manual provisioning by
50% in a large-scale customer environment.
• Upgraded CDRO Orchestration microservice runtime from Java 17 to Java 21, resolving breaking changes and delivering the
migration without regression issues.
• Diagnosed and resolved critical production issues involving multithreading, race conditions, and database performance bottlenecks
through SQL query optimization and indexing.
• Reduced Java memory leaks using heap dump analysis, JVM monitoring tools, and cache optimization techniques.
• Enhanced application maintainability through code refactoring using modern Java features, appropriate design patterns and
resolution of SonarQube-reported code quality issues.
• Increased test coverage using JUnit, Mockito, and Spock, reducing ﬂaky test retries by 40% and reducing compute costs.
• Implemented TLS-secured database connectivity across PostgreSQL, MySQL, and Oracle and validated performance impact through
CI pipelines (Jenkins).
• Strengthened application security by resolving Snyk-identiﬁed vulnerabilities (XSS, CSRF, command injection) across multiple
microservices, reducing security ﬁndings by over 40%.
BUDDI AI Jun 2022 – Mar 2024
Software Engineer Chennai
• Developed REST API for Elasticsearch-based search platform, enabling self-service medical records uploads by SMEs and eliminating
manual indexing bottleneck for large-scale data onboarding.
• Optimized Hibernate ORM performance by resolving N+1 query issues, improving batching strategies, and reducing database query
overhead.
• Deployed and managed microservices using AWS ECS Fargate and EC2, enabling scalable containerized deployments with
CloudWatch-based log monitoring.
• Introduced event-driven workﬂow using Kafka to orchestrate existing microservices (OCR, PHI masking), enabling asynchronous
processing of thousands of documents per minute.
• Implemented in-memory caching with TTL-based invalidation to reduce API response latency and minimize database load for
high-traﬃc services.
• Optimized Docker build pipeline using multi-stage builds, reducing image size by 50% and accelerating deployment time in
Kubernetes-based environments.
Trimble Jan 2022 – Jun 2022
Graduate Technical Intern Chennai
• Developed automated test scripts using Java and Selenium WebDriver, improving test coverage for new application features.
• Documented and executed 100+ manual test cases in T estRail, identifying defects and improving feature reliability in an Agile
environment.
T echnical Skills
Languages:Java, Python, Groovy, SQLFrameworks:Spring Boot, Spring Data JPA Hibernate, Kafka
DevOps:Docker, Kubernetes, Helm, AWS(EC2 ECS S3), CI/CDDatabases:MySQL, Elasticsearch
Backend :REST APIs, Microservices, Event-Driven Architecture
Education
Thiagarajar College of Engineering 2018 – 2022
B.Tech Information Technology (GPA: 8.73) TamilNadu
